basic_details.job_title: IIT Kanpur Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kanpur (IIT Kanpur) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced for the Research Associate post through the IIT Kanpur Research Associate Recruitment 2026. Candidates who have a Ph.D. with first class or equivalent in their preceding degrees are eligible to apply for these vacancies. The application process for IIT Kanpur Research Associate Recruitment 2026 will remain open until 25 May 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply via email through the direct link

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent (in preceding degrees)
qualification.details: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent (in preceding degrees). Fresh Ph.D.s or those who have submitted dissertation and awaiting viva voce.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on CV Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kanpur Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate position at IIT Kanpur?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Associate position at IIT Kanpur is 25 May 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. with first class or equivalent in their preceding degrees. Fresh Ph.D. holders or those awaiting viva voce are also encouraged to apply.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 69,600/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application for the Research Associate position at IIT Kanpur must be submitted via Email. Please follow the instructions in the official notification for the correct email address and format.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the Research Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this Research Associate recruitment at IIT Kanpur.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves initial shortlisting of candidates based on their CV, followed by an online interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The Research Associate position at IIT Kanpur is a contract-based job.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What are the important dates for this recruitment drive?
faq.answer: The most crucial date to remember is the last date to apply, which is 25 May 2026. Ensure your application is sent by this date.
